message.content: This section presents a curated collection of high-performing active advertising creatives for Kingshot in 2025. It supports retrieval for: **Topics/Entities** (Kingshot 2025 ad campaigns and creative assets); **Dates** (February 2025 through December 2025); **Metrics & Selection Criteria** (creatives filtered by high new-launch impressions or elevated popularity/heat scores); **Data Source** (GuangdaDa/广大大 Advertiser Analysis Module); **Procedures/Format** (interactive media layout where clicking thumbnail images plays the full creative); and **Evidence Types** (platform-verified, performance-ranked ad examples used for creative benchmarking and campaign trend analysis).
